prioritized_patterns.design_note: Convert semantically correct direct/scalar outputs into canonical read_file tool_calls without altering user-intent phrasing diversity.
Prioritize scalar/token outputs that indicate intent understood but procedure skipped.
do_not_do: blanket suppression of numeric outputs without procedural alternatives

prioritized_patterns.design_note: Teach positive procedural continuation: if uncertain about final result, still emit canonical call to gather evidence.
Ensure exact-valid improvements are not tied to one literal lexical shell.

success_signals_predefined: scalar/direct substitution share decreases versus i9
read_file exact-valid rises above zero with non-regressed no-call/wrapper invariants
anchor-dominance does not increase toward trigger threshold
top-1 behavioral category share remains below collapse threshold with stable diversity
